text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our second summer camp begins. Now
unshackled by doubts, Fine Motion intends to
enjoy it to the best of her ability.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Fine Motion's situation has spurred
Air Shakur into striving to move forward as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Sapporo Kinen awaits midway through
summer camp, and Fine Motion readies herself for
it with a newfound resolve!
